title: abutilon insigne
intro: Abutilon insigne, also known as the flowering maple, is a species of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The leaves and roots of Abutilon insigne have been used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations, offering several health benefits. Abutilon insigne can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it accessible for various herbal preparations.
